ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author(s) of the book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the book */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the book */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number for unique identification */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the publishers table */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the series table */,
  "edition" INTEGER /* Edition number of the book */,
  "reprint" INTEGER /* Reprint number of the book */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., Hardcover, Paperback, eBook) */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the book's cover image */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the book */,
  "reviews_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author FOREIGN KEY ("author") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the author (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the author's website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* URL to the author's social media profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "book_id" TEXT /* ID of the book sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of books sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price at which the book was sold (may differ from the list price) */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale occurred */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made (e.g., Online, In-store) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Membership level of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the publisher's website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the series cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_authors" (
  "book_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the books table */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the authors table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the book (e.g., Author, Editor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_roles table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_permissions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
